selection.selection_note: All 43 repaired rows from owned_repair_batch18.json were judged against semantic_brief plus S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map/provider witnesses where present.

verdicts.expected: BRIDGE01 is symbol for opening bridge. It is used as a symbol for opening bridge. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta ring but still adds a diagonal slash and center dash details; S-101/OpenCPN show the opening-bridge ring/double-ring witness without those internal marks.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the BRIDGE01 opening-bridge concentric ring/double-ring witness; remove the diagonal slash and center dash details.

verdicts.expected: CGUSTA02 is coastguard station. It is used as a coastguard station. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: white.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate replaces the placeholder with the expected CG station placard. The S-101 fill treatment is more lavender, but the symbol class, text cue, and point-marker structure are correct for visual-rerun pass. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta/white CG placard with a point-marker stem; it preserves the coastguard station text cue and point marker seen in the S-101/OpenCPN witnesses.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: CRANES01 is cranes. It is used as a cranes. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black generic crane silhouette; S-101/OpenCPN show the brown crane with the reference post/base/hook proportions.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the brown S-101/OpenCPN crane with boom, post, hook, base, and reference colour family.

verdicts.expected: CURDEF01 is current or tidal stream whose direction is not known. It is used as a current or tidal stream whose direction is not known. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate has an up arrow and question marks, but substitutes a blue curved lower stroke for the straight current-arrow/barb structure in the S-101/OpenCPN witness.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the vertical current/stream arrow with side question marks and straight lower barb/stem structure; remove the curved lower arc.

verdicts.expected: CURENT01 is non-tidal current. It is used as a non-tidal current. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the non-tidal-current arrow/barb silhouette. Stroke colour is Helm-styled lighter blue, but the direction and current-symbol geometry match the witness closely enough for rerun pass. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a vertical current arrow with lower branching barbs and no curved secondary stroke.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: DAYSQR21 is square or rectangular daymark, paper chart. It is used as a square or rectangular daymark, paper chart. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a yellow square dayboard on a stem; the row references show the provider-defined square/rectangular daymark colour/stem/base treatment rather than this black/yellow board.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw DAYSQR21 with the provider/reference daymark colour family and base/ring details; do not substitute a yellow black-outlined board.

verdicts.expected: DWRTPT51 is part of deep water route. It is used as a part of deep water route. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate puts DW text in a rounded magenta placard; S-101/OpenCPN show DW text without that enclosing signboard.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the DW deep-water-route text mark in the reference style; remove the rounded enclosing placard.

verdicts.expected: EBBSTR01 is ebb stream, rate at spring tides. It is used as a ebb stream, rate at spring tides. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate removes the prior inversion/placeholder and preserves the upward stream-rate arrow class. Styling is lighter than S-101/OpenCPN but the geometry is correct for visual-rerun pass. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a simple upward stream arrow matching the ebb-stream direction witness.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: FAIRWY51 is fairway with one-way traffic in direction indicated. It is used as a fairway with one-way traffic in direction indicated. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta outlined up arrow; S-101/OpenCPN show a grey/black one-way fairway arrow outline.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the vertical one-way fairway arrow using the reference colour/stroke treatment, not magenta precaution/route styling.

verdicts.expected: FAIRWY52 is fairway with two-way traffic. It is used as a fairway with two-way traffic. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a magenta two-way arrow; S-101/OpenCPN show a grey/black two-way fairway arrow outline.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the vertical two-way fairway arrow using the reference colour/stroke treatment, not magenta styling.

verdicts.expected: FLDSTR01 is flood stream, rate at spring tides. It is used as a flood stream, rate at spring tides. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate has a symmetric light-blue current arrow; the flood-stream witness has the specific side-barb/rate cue rather than symmetric lower branches.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with the S-101/OpenCPN upward flood-stream arrow and side-rate barb geometry.

verdicts.expected: FLGSTF01 is flagstaff, flagpole. It is used as a flagstaff, flagpole. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is an outline flag on a simple pole; S-101/OpenCPN show a brown/gold filled flagstaff with base/ring detail.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw the brown/gold flagstaff with the reference flag shape plus base/ring marker.

verdicts.expected: FLTHAZ02 is FLTHAZ02. It is used as a obstruction or hazard marking. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black hull/chevron hazard icon; S-101 shows the magenta circular floating-hazard symbol with crossing/wave elements.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw FLTHAZ02 as the magenta circular floating-hazard witness from S-101/OpenCPN; remove the black hull/chevron substitution.

verdicts.expected: FOGSIG01 is fog signal. It is used as a fog signal. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate adds a black bell/horn body below signal arcs; S-101/OpenCPN/AquaMap show the fog-signal arcs as the load-bearing cue without that body.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the fog-signal arc glyph in the reference purple/magenta treatment; remove the invented bell/horn body.
source_refs_used: aquamap:Fog signal (Bell, Horn, Whistle, Gong, Explosive, Diaphone, Siren, Reed, Typhon ...):reference_sources/aquamap_map_symbols/images/BELL1.png

verdicts.expected: FOULGND1 is foul area of seabed safe for navigation but not for anchoring. It is used as a obstruction or hazard marking. Required geometry: anchor/anchorage symbol. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black asterisk/star; S-101/OpenCPN show an open hash/slash foul-ground mark.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the open foul-ground hash/slash mark; do not use an asterisk/star.

verdicts.expected: FRYARE51 is ferry area. It is used as a ferry area. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate uses an F placard/sign; S-101/OpenCPN show a ferry-route/area line symbol with ferry outline, not a boxed letter sign.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the ferry-area route/ferry-outline witness; remove the F signboard.

verdicts.expected: FRYARE52 is cable ferry area. It is used as a cable ferry area. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.

verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the cable-ferry area route/ferry-outline witness; remove the CF signboard.

verdicts.expected: FSHFAC02 is fishing stakes. It is used as a fishing stakes. Required geometry: spar/stake vertical body. Required colours: reference-defined.

verdicts.observed: Candidate is a gold triangular stake marker; S-101/OpenCPN show the fishing-stakes frame with angled stake.

verdicts.expected: FSHGRD01 is fishing ground. It is used as a fishing ground. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.

verdicts.expected: NORTHAR1 is north arrow. It is used as a north arrow. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.

verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the NORTHAR1 simple orange north-arrow/stem glyph with reference N placement.

verdicts.expected: NOTBRD11 is notice board, visual conspicuous, full-chart and simplified. It is used as a special-purpose beacon used for named local purposes. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate restores the black notice-board silhouette; minor stroke/base weight differences are styling, not a semantic mismatch. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a black notice board on a post with base, matching the conspicuous notice-board/post class.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.judge_comments: Still requires repair before visual approval. This is not final human approval.
verdicts.observed: Candidate is a green dashed ring with a center dot; S-101/OpenCPN/AquaMap show a filled green/teal dotted obstruction circle.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with the reference filled/tinted obstruction circle and dotted perimeter; remove the center-dot-only treatment.
